title: Blackstone Ribeye with Beef Tallow
description: A fast griddle-seared ribeye with a beef tallow crust.
steps: Rest at room temperature while the griddle heats.
notes: Use the thermometer for consistency. Rest before slicing.
recommendedReason: The 36-inch Blackstone gives the best crust and enough room to manage hot and cooler zones.

oven.note: Good for reverse sear, but it needs a pan finish for crust.
instructions: Heat oven to 120 C.
Cook steak on a rack to 45 to 48 C internal.
Finish in a very hot pan with beef tallow for 60 to 90 seconds per side.

airFryer.note: Works for convenience, but crust is weaker than griddle searing.
instructions: Preheat COSORI air fryer to 200 C.
Cook steak for 7 to 10 minutes, turning once.
Rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Heat the Blackstone to high.
Melt beef tallow on the hot zone.
Sear steak for 3 to 5 minutes per side.
Move to a cooler zone if the outside browns before the center is ready.
Rest for 5 minutes.

title: Crispy Beef Patties
description: Thin beef patties with crisp browned edges.
notes: Do not move the patties too early. The crust releases more easily once browned.
recommendedReason: The Blackstone has the space and surface contact needed for crisp edges.

oven.note: Useful for batch cooking but less crisp.
instructions: Heat oven to 220 C.
Place patties on a lined tray.
Bake for 10 to 14 minutes, turning once.
Preheat COSORI air fryer to 200 C.
Cook patties in a single layer for 8 to 10 minutes.
Use reheat at 180 C for 3 minutes for leftovers.
Heat Blackstone to medium-high.
Melt beef tallow.
Smash beef balls thin with a firm spatula.
Cook until edges brown deeply, then flip once.
Salt and serve hot.

title: Soft Scrambled Eggs with Butter
description: Low-heat soft scrambled eggs finished with butter.
notes: Dairy is intentional here and should not be treated as a problem.
recommendedReason: A low cooler zone on the Blackstone works well for gentle eggs while other food cooks nearby.

oven.note: Oven heat is too broad for soft scrambled eggs.

airFryer.note: Air fryer airflow sets the eggs unevenly.

blackstone.note: Use a cooler zone and keep the eggs moving.
instructions: Set the Blackstone to low on one side.
Melt butter gently.
Add eggs and stir continuously with a spatula.
Remove while glossy.

title: Pork Belly Bites
description: Salted pork belly cubes with crisp edges.
steps: Cut pork belly into 3 cm cubes.
recommendedReason: The COSORI air fryer renders fat efficiently and crisps the edges without much handling.

instructions: Heat oven to 210 C.
Spread pork belly on a rack over a tray.
Roast for 25 to 35 minutes, turning once.

airFryer.note: Best crisping for a small batch.
instructions: Preheat COSORI air fryer to 190 C.
Cook in a single layer for 25 to 30 minutes.
Shake basket halfway through.
Rest for 3 minutes.

blackstone.note: Works, but fat splatter is more active.
instructions: Heat Blackstone to medium.
Cook cubes on a cooler zone first to render fat.
Move to hotter zone to crisp all sides.

title: Salmon in Butter
description: Salmon cooked with butter and salt.
notes: Keep heat moderate so butter browns without burning.
recommendedReason: The COSORI air fryer cooks salmon quickly and evenly with minimal handling.

instructions: Heat oven to 190 C.
Place salmon in a small dish with butter on top.
Bake for 10 to 14 minutes.

airFryer.note: Best for speed and clean handling.
instructions: Preheat COSORI air fryer to 180 C.
Place salmon skin-side down.
Cook for 7 to 10 minutes.
Top with butter for the final 2 minutes.

blackstone.note: Works if the surface is clean and oiled.
instructions: Heat Blackstone to medium.
Cook skin-side down until crisp.
Flip briefly and finish with butter.

title: Carnivore Flatbread
description: A flexible egg, cream cheese, and pork rind flatbread.
reason_not_strict: Uses dairy and a bread-style format for convenience.
steps: Blend eggs, cream cheese, pork rind crumbs, and salt until smooth.
notes: Let it cool before cutting so it holds together.
recommendedReason: The oven gives the most even set across a thin sheet.

instructions: Heat oven to 190 C.
Bake on parchment for 18 to 22 minutes.
Cool for 5 minutes before cutting.

airFryer.note: Works only in smaller pieces because of basket size.
instructions: Preheat COSORI air fryer to 175 C.
Cook small parchment-supported portions for 9 to 12 minutes.

blackstone.note: The batter is too loose for a griddle until it sets.

title: Cottage Cheese Flatbread
description: A soft dairy-rich flatbread based on cottage cheese and eggs.
reason_not_strict: Uses cottage cheese and a bread-style format.
steps: Blend cottage cheese, eggs, parmesan, and salt until smooth.
Spread on parchment in a thin rectangle.
recommendedReason: The oven dries and sets the dairy batter evenly.

instructions: Heat oven to 190 C.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes until set and browned at the edges.
Cool before peeling from parchment.
Preheat COSORI air fryer to 170 C.
Cook small portions on parchment for 10 to 14 minutes.

blackstone.note: The wet dairy batter does not set cleanly on the griddle.

title: 2-Ingredient Carnivore Flatbread
description: A simple egg and pork rind flatbread for a quick base.
steps: Whisk eggs and pork rind crumbs.
Rest for 3 minutes so crumbs hydrate.
notes: Add salt only if the pork rinds are not already salty.
recommendedReason: The oven gives the most reliable flat, even result.

instructions: Heat oven to 190 C.
Bake for 15 to 18 minutes.
Cool before cutting.
Preheat COSORI air fryer to 175 C.
Cook on parchment for 8 to 10 minutes.

blackstone.note: Use a very thin layer and low heat.
instructions: Set Blackstone to low.
Spread a thin layer on a lightly greased cooler zone.
Cook until set, then flip carefully.

title: 3-Ingredient Carnivore-Style Burger Buns
description: Simple bun rounds made from eggs, cream cheese, and pork rind crumbs.
reason_not_strict: Uses dairy and a bun-style format.
steps: Divide into a greased muffin-top pan.
notes: Toast cut sides in beef tallow for more structure.
recommendedReason: The oven gives the buns time to set without burning the outside.

instructions: Heat oven to 180 C.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
Cool before slicing.
Preheat COSORI air fryer to 165 C.
Cook in small moulds for 10 to 14 minutes.

blackstone.note: The batter needs mould support and even surrounding heat.

title: Air Fryer Meatballs
description: Simple beef meatballs cooked quickly in the COSORI air fryer.
steps: Mix beef, egg, parmesan, and salt.
notes: Do not pack the meat too tightly.
recommendedReason: The COSORI air fryer browns the outside quickly while keeping the batch contained.

instructions: Heat oven to 210 C.
Bake meatballs on a tray for 14 to 18 minutes.

airFryer.note: Best browning for this size batch.
instructions: Preheat COSORI air fryer to 190 C.
Cook meatballs in a single layer for 10 to 12 minutes.
Use reheat at 180 C for 3 to 4 minutes for leftovers.

blackstone.note: Works if flattened slightly; round meatballs roll.
instructions: Heat Blackstone to medium.
Flatten meatballs slightly.
Cook on all sides until browned and cooked through.

title: Carnivore Vanilla Ice Cream
description: Unsweetened cream and egg yolk ice cream with vanilla.
steps: Temper egg yolks with warm cream.
Stir over low heat until lightly thickened.
notes: This is unsweetened. Add only ingredients that fit your own version.
recommendedReason: No oven, air fryer, or Blackstone method is appropriate; stovetop custard plus ice cream maker is the practical method.

oven.note: This recipe needs stovetop custard and churning, not oven cooking.

airFryer.note: Air fryer heat is not suitable for custard or ice cream.

blackstone.note: A griddle is not suitable for custard or ice cream.

title: Egg Yolk Custard
description: A small stovetop custard made with yolks, cream, and butter.
reason_not_strict: Includes cream and butter, which are dairy.
recommendedReason: The required listed appliances are not ideal; a gentle oven water bath is the closest controlled option.

oven.note: Use a water bath for gentle heat.
instructions: Heat oven to 150 C.
Pour custard into ramekins.
Place ramekins in a tray with hot water.
Bake for 18 to 25 minutes until just set.

airFryer.note: Airflow and direct heat can scramble the custard.

blackstone.note: Griddle heat is too direct for custard.

title: Mascarpone Cream Bowl
description: A quick cold dairy bowl with mascarpone and cream.
steps: Add mascarpone, cream, and salt to a cold bowl.
recommendedReason: No cooking appliance is needed; keep this recipe cold.

oven.note: This is a cold recipe and should not be baked.

airFryer.note: This is a cold recipe and should not be air fried.

blackstone.note: This is a cold recipe and should not be cooked on a griddle.
